title: Vocational Rehabilitation * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Employment > Vocational Rehabilitation * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Blindness Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTHSTAR CLUBHOUSE CLUBHOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides people with mental health challenges a working community to focus on social and vocational rehabilitation through two separate programs. Members participate in a structured working day in which members help staff operate the agency. This program also provides peer support, and social and recreational activities. 5600 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following qualifications: -Age 18 and older -Have a mental health diagnosis -Have a referral from a mental health professional -Attend orientation -Be willing to interact with other members and staff in a respectful manner Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, including major holidays for members Orientation: 1st and 3rd Wednesday of the month 3pm Email (971) 271-7273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ABACUS FOR YOUTH AND ADULTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides psychiatric rehabilitation services for transition-age youth and adults with serious mental illness. Services include illness management, recovery groups and classes, dual diagnosis (mental illness and substance abuse) treatment, and vocational and education services. 627 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Ages 16 and older, diagnosed with serious mental illness Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8:30am-9pm, Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-8pm (503) 434-7523 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHSTAR CLUBHOUSE CLUBHOUSE YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ABACUS FOR YOUTH AND ADULTS
